'''Bialy''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] who served as a member of the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]] and a partner to [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Quarsh Panaka/Legends|Quarsh Panaka]] around [[36 BBY/Legends|36 BBY]]. Together, they went on a mission and took the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] [[Kroke Modbom]] from [[Port Landien]] and delivered him to [[Maris Magneta]]. Later she accompanied Panaka during his guard duty, but was too far away to help him when he was nearly killed by [[Veermok/Legends|Veermok]]. She was later in the debriefing of the present contract, after [[Sate Pestage/Legends|Sate Pestage]] had shot Veermok.<ref name="The Monster" />
